mapper.select: SELECT c.course_name, c.course_code AS course_id, MIN(cs.section_no) || '분반' AS division, TO_CHAR(sm.year) || '-' || CASE sm.term WHEN 'SPRING' THEN '1' WHEN 'FALL' THEN '2' ELSE sm.term END || '학기' AS semester, COALESCE(SUM(cs.enrolled_count), 0) AS total_students, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_request cr JOIN course_section rcs ON rcs.section_id = cr.section_id JOIN course rc ON rc.course_id = rcs.course_id JOIN semester rsm ON rsm.semester_id = rcs.semester_id JOIN professor rp ON rp.professor_id = rcs.professor_id WHERE rp.user_id = #{professorUserId} AND rc.course_code = #{courseId} AND rcs.status != 'CANCELLED' AND rsm.is_current = 1 AND cr.status = 'PENDING' ) AS request_count FROM professor p JOIN course_section cs ON cs.professor_id = p.professor_id JOIN course c ON c.course_id = cs.course_id JOIN semester sm ON sm.semester_id = cs.semester_id WHERE p.user_id = #{professorUserId} AND c.course_code = #{courseId} AND cs.status != 'CANCELLED' AND sm.is_current = 1 GROUP BY c.course_name, c.course_code, sm.year, sm.term

SELECT request_id, student_id, name, grade, major, created_at, reason FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(cr.request_id) AS request_id, ua.login_id AS student_id, s.name, s.year_level AS grade, d.dept_name AS major, TO_CHAR(cr.requested_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS created_at, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(cr.reason, 4000, 1) AS reason, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY cr.requested_at DESC, cr.request_id DESC) AS row_num FROM course_request cr JOIN student s ON s.student_id = cr.student_id JOIN user_account ua ON ua.user_id = s.user_id JOIN department d ON d.dept_id = s.dept_id JOIN course_section cs ON cs.section_id = cr.section_id JOIN course c ON c.course_id = cs.course_id JOIN semester sm ON sm.semester_id = cs.semester_id JOIN professor p ON p.professor_id = cs.professor_id WHERE p.user_id = #{professorUserId} AND c.course_code = #{courseId} AND cs.status != 'CANCELLED' AND sm.is_current = 1 AND cr.status = 'PENDING' ) WHERE row_num > #{offset} AND row_num <= #{offset} + #{size} ORDER BY row_num

SELECT cr.request_id AS request_pk, TO_CHAR(cr.request_id) AS request_id, cr.status, su.user_id AS student_user_id, pu.user_id AS professor_user_id, cs.section_id, c.course_name FROM course_request cr JOIN student s ON s.student_id = cr.student_id JOIN user_account su ON su.user_id = s.user_id JOIN course_section cs ON cs.section_id = cr.section_id JOIN course c ON c.course_id = cs.course_id JOIN professor p ON p.professor_id = cs.professor_id JOIN user_account pu ON pu.user_id = p.user_id WHERE pu.user_id = #{professorUserId} AND c.course_code = #{courseId} AND TO_CHAR(cr.request_id) = #{requestId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification ( notification_id, recipient_user_id, sender_user_id, target_section_id, target_request_id, title, body, type, is_read, created_at ) VALUES ( (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(notification_id), 0) + 1 FROM notification), #{recipientUserId}, #{senderUserId}, #{targetSectionId}, #{targetRequestId}, #{title}, #{body}, #{type}, 0, #{createdAt} )
